'''TC-3''' was a [[TC-series protocol droid/Legends|TC-series]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] belonging to [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Yeb Yeb Adem'thorn]].

==Characteristics==
TC-3 had primarily red plating with silver colored seams. He was distinguished by a silver neck, which almost gave the appearance that his red-colored head was floating.

==Behind the scenes==
TC-3 was cut from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']]. [[Star Wars: I Am a Droid (Random House)|''Star Wars Episode I: I Am a Droid'']] indicates that TC-3 was an early name for [[TC-14/Legends|TC-14]].
